rules: imagery should have high appetite appeal
silo images should be photographed consistently according to packaging or product type
minimize reflections on plastic, foil, and shiny packaging, especially when covering important product information
remove unnecessary stickers not part of package design, such as special promotion stickers or legal declarations
packaging and labels should be presented straight, not angled or crooked
photograph each unique and meaningful side of the product package
for round or irregular shapes, present sides so printed information and graphics are centered and legible
front view is the side with predominant brand and labeling, format, variant, and size/quantity
products should be evenly lit from side to side and top to bottom
exposure and color should correctly represent the item
maintain separation between product and background
clip products onto pure white background, RGB 255/255/255
retouch dirt, dust, fingerprints, damage, blemishes, expiration dates, lot numbers, and sample-only information
lifestyle images should be realistic, professionally lit, and styled appropriately to the item and brand
product being sold should remain the hero of the lifestyle image
packaging should be incorporated into lifestyle images when practical to connect lifestyle images to silo shots
items must display all indicated required images and conditionally required images and meet the minimum image count listed on each page

main_image.label: Main Image
main_image.description: Primary carousel image/hero image for the PDP.

silo_front.label: Silo, Front
silo_front.guidance: Shoot straight on out of package on a pure white background.
silo_front.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image out of package on pure white.

silo_front_in_pack.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_in_pack.guidance: Shoot straight on in package on a pure white background.
silo_front_in_pack.recommendation: Add a straight-on front silo image in package on pure white.

silo_front_full_item.label: Silo, Front
silo_front_full_item.guidance: Shoot straight on or at an angle to show the entire item on a pure white background.
silo_front_full_item.recommendation: Add a front silo image showing the entire item clearly on pure white.

silo_alt_in_pack.label: Silo, Alt, In Pack
silo_alt_in_pack.guidance: Photograph the side or back of the product to clearly capture all label information. Shoot straight on with no plunge shots.
silo_alt_in_pack.recommendation: Add a side/back in-pack silo image with all label information straight and legible.

silo_back.label: Silo, Back
silo_back.guidance: Show the back of product on a pure white background.
silo_back.recommendation: Add a back-of-product silo image on pure white.

dimensions.label: Dimensions
dimensions.guidance: Use a scale avatar or apply product dimensions to the front-of-pack image.
dimensions.recommendation: Add a dimensions graphic using a scale avatar or applied dimensions.

lifestyle_in_use.label: Lifestyle, In-Use
lifestyle_in_use.guidance: Show the product in a lifestyle setting that aligns with the brand.
lifestyle_in_use.recommendation: Add a lifestyle image showing the product in a brand-appropriate in-use setting.

feature_graphic.label: Feature Graphic
feature_graphic.guidance: Highlight a product feature or benefit using supporting text and graphics.
feature_graphic.recommendation: Add a clean feature graphic highlighting product benefits or features.

graphic_guarantee.label: Graphic, Guarantee
graphic_guarantee.guidance: Display the Private Brand Guarantee graphic as a clean, centered digital asset.
graphic_guarantee.recommendation: Add a clean Private Brand Guarantee graphic when applicable.

graphic_ingredients.label: Graphic, Ingredients
graphic_ingredients.guidance: Pull from packaging flat for legibility and clarity.
graphic_ingredients.recommendation: Add a flat ingredients graphic pulled from packaging for legibility.

graphic_count.label: Graphic, Count
graphic_count.guidance: Display pack count and value using a clean graphic with bold typography and visible product.
graphic_count.recommendation: Add a count/value graphic showing pack count clearly with bold typography and visible product.

notes: Preserve repeated feature_graphic because the source page shows two separate feature graphics.
Both feature graphics highlight a product feature or benefit using supporting text and graphics.
Product photography should follow a consistent visual approach to ensure cohesion across the assortment.
Consistency in angle is critical to maintain a unified PDP and shelf presentation.
Individual brand guidelines should take precedence.
